title: Coruscant Museum of Galactic Cultures
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Coruscant Museum}}
The '''Coruscant Museum of Galactic Cultures''' was a museum and research center on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Its research and displays were centered depictions of the various cultures of the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]], in an attempt to demonstrate how they could live and cooperate together.

The museum, which had stagnated during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era, experienced a resurgence following the recapture of Coruscant by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

During a prisoner revolt at [[Mine Head 37]] on [[Delrian/Legends|Delrian]], the head of the museum was summoned by Delrian authorities to help resolve the situation.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''
